race.comment: DIRTY DIANA (4) resumes. She's a lightly raced filly who looked good in two starts last time in, winning on debut at Traralgon before a good effort up in grade at Sale. Drawn wide for the apprentice here but if they're using the straight she'll be very hard to beat. NASRAAWY (1) hasn't won this time in but is going okay and we know what we'll get with the 8yo. He'll roll forward, handles all ground and should be fighting out the finish. CHARTWELL HOUSE (6) has come back well with two good runs when kept to the short trip. Drawn to sit a bit handier now and has claims. GAME PLAN (5) resumes. She won first up at Ballarat on heavy and should be hitting the line late. REMEMBER POPPY (10) resumes and will be in this for a long way.
